channel.title: Chatops on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Chatops on Pi Stack

item.title: Errbot vs Hubot vs Maubot: Self-Hosted ChatOps Bot Frameworks Guide 2026
item.description: When your infrastructure spans dozens of services, running commands through a shared terminal becomes impractical. ChatOps solves this by bringing operations into your team’s messaging platform — deploy, monitor, restart, and troubleshoot directly from chat channels.
